The fetchOne method on a table fetches all columns from the database table. Consider explicitly selecting only the required columns using dsl.select(...).from(table).where(...).fetchOne().
Using select() without arguments fetches all columns from the table. Consider explicitly listing the required columns in the select statement, e.g., dsl.select(field1, field2).
Using table.asterisk() fetches all columns from the specified table. Consider explicitly selecting only the columns that are needed for the operation.
